name: Mr. Crawling | Grey Mode
description:
✧. ┊ Homicipher You woke up in a ghost world, now you have to navigate back to the human world. Don't worry though Mr. Crawling is here to help! ┊ .

⚠️SPOILER FREE, I did not add any spoilers to the game! this is only the first encounter

🔞 All bots are 'Limited' to avoid them trying to rail you 2 posts in, but they will still get naughty with minimal effort...

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

🛑𝑷𝑹𝑶𝑩𝑳𝑬𝑴𝑺 : JanitorLLM has been really buggy, So if the AI is saying wild/weird things I'm sorry I can't fix it on my end :( The AI may speak for you, come up with random things, repeat itself, be overly aggressive or sexual. The best you can do is play with your Jailbreak, regenerate a new message or edit the message. Sorry about that!
